name: canadian-tax-cra
description: CRA compliance assistant for Canadian small business owners — GST/HST, payroll, corporate tax, and SR&ED

commands.name: gst-filing
commands.description: Calculate net GST/HST owing, ITC breakdown, Quick Method comparison, and filing summary

commands.name: payroll-calc
commands.description: Calculate CPP, EI, income tax deductions, employer costs, net pay, and CRA remittance

commands.name: cra-deadlines
commands.description: Generate a personalized 12-month CRA deadline calendar

commands.name: sred-screen
commands.description: Screen a project for SR&ED tax credit eligibility (Green / Yellow / Red rating)

commands.name: grant-finder
commands.description: Find applicable federal and provincial grant programs ranked by value

commands.name: t2-checklist
commands.description: Generate a T2 corporate tax preparation checklist tailored to your corporation
